---
title: "Blog"
description: "Japanese posts and translated English articles."
listing:
  contents:
    - "posts/**/*.qmd"
    - "!en/posts/**/*.qmd"
    - "!starter-template/posts/**/*.qmd"
  sort: "date desc"
  type: default
  categories: true
  date-format: iso
---

Most posts are written in Japanese. Translated English versions are listed separately on [English Posts](en/posts.qmd).
